notes: Ported from LutzNagell; provides normalised EDS theory (IsEllSequence.normEDS, IsEllSequence.ext, normEDS_mul_complEDS, redInvar_normEDS) needed for division polynomial ZSMul development. The central proof strategy universalises to MvPolynomial Param ℤ (eliminating nonzerodivisor hypotheses) via normEDS_eq_aeval + aeval. Several lemmas (map_invarNum, map_invarDenom, complEDS₂_eq_aeval, isEllSequence_iff_rel₃, etc.) appear unused within the file and are dead-code candidates, likely exported for other consumers or left from porting.
